core_principles: Tactical Minimalism: Replace soft shadows with 1px solid strokes or 2px 'Inner Glow'.
High-Density Data: Use compact grids and tables for maximum information density.
Visual Hierarchy: Use color only for status (Match Score) and action (Primary Button). Everything else is monochrome.
Tech-First Aesthetic: Use monospace fonts for headers and data points to reflect the IT nature of the tool.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.default: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/80

images.description: Abstract dark wavy lines textured background for sidebar or welcome screen

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text meets APCA standards against backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPERATIVE: Create a 'Recruitment/Jobs' folder structure in the backend if not exists.
IMPERATIVE: Use 'shadcn/ui' components for all interactive elements.
IMPERATIVE: Implement 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., 'Resumes parsed successfully').
IMPERATIVE: Use 'Recharts' for any data visualization (e.g., Skills Match Chart).
IMPERATIVE: The dashboard must be 'High Density'. Avoid excessive whitespace in data tables.
IMPERATIVE: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all numeric data (Match Scores, Phone Numbers) and headings.
IMPERATIVE: Implement a 'Dark Mode' toggle, but default to Dark Mode.
IMPERATIVE: Ensure Excel export is a prominent primary action.
IMPERATIVE: Do not use gradient backgrounds for the main content area. Solid dark colors only.
IMPERATIVE: All buttons must have a 'data-testid' attribute.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers only.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Subtle grain textures or noise overlays can be used on the sidebar background.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
